texto: Google has placed its faith in data, while Apple worships the power of design. This dichotomy made the two companies complementary. Apple would ship the phones and computers, while Google would provide Maps, Search, YouTube, and other web tools that made the devices more useful.
explicacao: Citação de Ben Parr sobre temas ligados a fe. “Google has placed its faith in data, while Apple worships the power of design. This dichotomy mad…” articula fe, faith, power em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como power e design.

texto: Building a successful company (or living a happy life, for that matter) is not about embracing someone else's philosophy, but staying true to your own beliefs about the world and learning from the mistakes you make along the way.
explicacao: Citação de Ben Parr sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Building a successful company (or living a happy life, for that matter) is not about embracing so…” articula vida, happy, mistakes em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como happy e mistakes.
